description_long: This sculpture features a classical-style human figure standing upright and supporting a large, shallow basin above its head. The figure is detailed with draped clothing and stands on a rectangular plinth, giving the piece a sense of stability and formality. The basin is circular with a thick, rounded rim and appears weathered, suggesting it may have been exposed to the elements. There is visible damage or breakage on one side of the basin, with a jagged edge and a darkened area. The overall coloration is a worn, off-white or light beige, typical of aged stone or concrete. The sculpture's design and posture evoke traditional garden or park ornamentation, possibly serving as a birdbath or decorative fountain.
description: A classical human figure supports a large, weathered basin atop its head, standing on a rectangular plinth. The sculpture is off-white with visible damage on the basin's rim.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full human figure holding the basin overhead, with clear details of the face, clothing, and plinth.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the basin and the extent of the damage on the rim, with the figure's profile partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the figure and the jagged break in the basin, with less detail on the face and more focus on the figure's posture.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizes the circular shape of the basin and the figure's side, showing both the plinth and the damaged rim.
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible, but the sculpture is typical of those found in parks, gardens, or urban plazas.
